sizing_rule.note: Apply shrink factor to average trade value to model alternative profit distributions and recalculate optimal f. Formula: Adjusted Average Trade = Average Trade × Shrink Factor. Optimal f derived from adjusted distribution. Specific shrink factor value and resulting optimal f not provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Adjust the average trade value using a shrink factor to model alternative profit distributions and determine optimal f for different expected trade scenarios.
